creator: antoine@FreeBSD.org
text:
openmpi fails to configure on i386:

https://pkg-status.freebsd.org/pb2/data/140i386-default-foo/2024-01-22_08h58m26s/logs/openmpi-5.0.1.log
https://pkg-status.freebsd.org/package23/data/132i386-default-foo/2024-01-22_08h58m30s/logs/openmpi-5.0.1.log

openmpi fails to package on 13.2 amd64:

https://pkg-status.freebsd.org/package22/data/132amd64-default-foo/2024-01-22_08h58m23s/logs/openmpi-5.0.1.log

on 14.0 amd64 it looks fine
